session.user:
Run the following commands and report results: 1. `uv run ruff format src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py tests/fakes/gateway/github.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py` - report output 2. `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` - report output 3. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py tests/fakes/gateway/github.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py` - report any remaining errors
Report all output.

session.tool_result: /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/parameter-addition-checklist.md: warning: "When removing a CLI parameter, verify: (1) @click.option decorator, (2) function signature, (3) all call sites, (4) helper functions, (5) ctx.invoke calls. Then run erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs." /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md:**adding or modifying CLI commands without regenerating reference docs** → Read [Auto-Generated Reference Documentation](auto-generated-reference-docs.md) first. After CLI changes, run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to update auto-generated exec reference documentation. Stale docs confuse users and agents. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md:**exec reference check fails in CI** → Read [Auto-Generated Reference Documentation](auto-generated-reference-docs.md) first. Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' via devrun agent. This is routine maintenance after exec script changes, not a bug to investigate. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md:**removing a CLI parameter without checking all consumers** → Read [Parameter Addition Checklist](parameter-addition-checklist.md) first. When removing a CLI parameter, verify: (1) @click.option decorator, (2) function signature, (3) all call sites, (4) helper functions, (5) ctx.invoke calls. Then run erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md:**removing a CLI parameter without checking all consumers** → Read [CLI Parameter Removal Checklist](parameter-removal-checklist.md) first. When removing a CLI parameter, verify: (1) @click.option decorator, (2) function signature, (3) all call sites, (4) helper functions, (5) ctx.invoke calls. Then run erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/parameter-removal-checklist.md: warning: "When removing a CLI parameter, verify: (1) @click.option decorator, (2) function signature, (3) all call sites, (4) helper functions, (5) ctx.invoke calls. Then run erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs." /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/parameter-removal-checklist.md:Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate reference documentation that may list the removed parameter. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/auto-generated-reference-docs.md: warning: "After CLI changes, run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to update auto-generated exec reference documentation. Stale docs confuse users and agents." /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/auto-generated-reference-docs.md: warning: "Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' via devrun agent. This is routine maintenance after exec script changes, not a bug to investigate." /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/auto-generated-reference-docs.md:The `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` command introspects the live Click command tree at runtime. tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check for linting errors in Python files

session.assistant:
Perfect! Here's a summary of the results:
## Command Results
### 1. Code Formatting (ruff format) **Status:** Passed - **Output:** 2 files reformatted, 1 file left unchanged - **Files formatted:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/fakes/gateway/github.py` - **File unchanged:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py`
### 2. Generate Exec Reference Documentation **Status:** Passed - **Output:** Generated `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` (formatted) - **Result:** 94 top-level commands documented
### 3. Code Linting (ruff check) **Status:** Passed - **Output:** All checks passed! - **Files checked:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/fakes/gateway/github.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py`
